component_description: New repos not in EXP-001 wave-1 or EXP-002 cohort, selected by proxy T-cell profile (dominant author, focused scope). T-cell membership confirmed post-clone by compute_moderators_exp101.py. All declared repos are scored regardless of T-cell outcome.

eligibility_audit.method: GitHub REST API (curl.exe) for 6 repos; knowledge-based assessment for 14 rate-limited repos. Uncertain repos (nox, docutils) flagged NEEDS_MANUAL.
eligibility_audit.rate_limit_note: API rate limited at ~30 calls (60/hr unauthenticated). Knowledge-based assessment used for remaining candidates. Verification via GH_TOKEN recommended.

fails_removed.reason: Python file count 49 < 50 (API-confirmed at eligibility audit)
Estimated Python file count ~20 < 50 (knowledge-based; very focused single-module library)
Slug resolves to GitHub 404; correct repo is wntrblm/nox (not in original candidate list). RQ-101-1 (Supervisor/supervisor) activated.

reStructuredText. 9843 commits (screenshot), Python 56.4%. MIRROR: single GitHub contributor (AA-Turner, SourceForge mirror). Commit authorship concentrated artificially. Expected non-T-cell (M2=9843/~200files≈49 >> threshold 7.703). Scored per protocol; excluded from primary test by M1/M2 computation.

Replaces nox/nox (slug resolves to 404; correct location wntrblm/nox not in original candidate list). Supervisor process control daemon; Chris McDonough + Agendaless Consulting primary. Est. ~2000 commits, ~80 py files. RQ-101-1 activated.
Replaces fabric/fabric (49 py files < 50). Giampaolo Rodola primary author. Est. ~2000 commits, ~100 py files. High-confidence T-cell candidate.
Replaces pytest-dev/pluggy (~20 py files). Paul Ganssle era. Focused datetime library. Est. ~500 commits, ~60 py files.

needs_manual_resolution: RESOLVED: C019 (docutils/docutils) CONFIRMED via screenshot (9843 commits, Python 56.4%, not archived); mirror/single-contributor note added. C020 (nox/nox) FAILED (slug 404); replaced by Supervisor/supervisor (RQ-101-1).

pre_cloning_attestation: This file committed and pushed BEFORE any Component C repository is cloned. Per HYPOTHESIS_exp101.md §4: declare first, clone after. NEEDS_MANUAL repos must be resolved before their clone step.
